import pandas as pd, zipfile

with zipfile.ZipFile\('nfl-big-data-bowl-2026-prediction.zip', 'r'\) as zf:
    with zf.open\('train/input_2023_w01.csv'\) as f:
        inp = pd.read_csv\(f, nrows=100\)

print\('a \(acceleration\) null count:', inp['a'].isna\(\).sum\(\), '/', len\(inp\)\)
print\('a sample values:', inp['a'].head\(5\).tolist\(\)\)
print\('s \(speed\) sample:', inp['s'].head\(5\).tolist\(\)\)
print\('dir sample:', inp['dir'].head\(5\).tolist\(\)\)
print\('ball_land_x sample:', inp['ball_land_x'].head\(5\).tolist\(\)\)
print\('ball_land_y sample:', inp['ball_land_y'].head\(5\).tolist\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_parquet\('data/processed/cleaned.parquet'\)
print\(f'cleaned.parquet: {len\(df\):,} rows x {len\(df.columns\)} cols'\)
print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\)\)

s = json.loads\(open\('data/processed/splits.json'\).read\(\)\)
print\(f'Train games: {len\(s[\\"train_game_ids\\"]\)}, Val: {len\(s[\\"val_game_ids\\"]\)}, Test: {len\(s[\\"test_game_ids\\"]\)}'\)
assert len\(set\(s['train_game_ids']\) & set\(s['test_game_ids']\)\) == 0, 'overlap!'
assert len\(set\(s['train_game_ids']\) & set\(s['val_game_ids']\)\) == 0, 'overlap!'
assert len\(set\(s['val_game_ids']\) & set\(s['test_game_ids']\)\) == 0, 'overlap!'
print\('Split disjoint: OK'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/Users/arcku/OneDrive/Desktop/CS/Projects/nflPrediction/Defensive-Trajectory-Prediction-Model" && python -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_parquet\('data/processed/cleaned.parquet'\)
required = {'gameId','playId','nflId','frameId','x','y','s','a_computed','dir_sin','dir_cos','o_sin','o_cos','is_interpolated','position','week'}
missing = required - set\(df.columns\)
assert not missing, f'Missing columns: {missing}'
print\(f'Schema OK — {len\(df\):,} rows, {len\(df.columns\)} cols'\)
null_accel = df['a_computed'].isna\(\).sum\(\)
total = len\(df\)
pct = null_accel / total
print\(f'Null acceleration: {null_accel:,} / {total:,} = {pct:.4%}'\)
assert pct < 0.05, f'Too many null accelerations: {pct:.4%}'
print\('Acceleration OK'\)
" 2>&1)

import json
s = json.loads\(open\('data/processed/splits.json'\).read\(\)\)
train = set\(s['train_game_ids']\)
test = set\(s['test_game_ids']\)
val = set\(s['val_game_ids']\)
assert train & test == set\(\), 'Train/test overlap!'
assert train & val == set\(\), 'Train/val overlap!'
assert val & test == set\(\), 'Val/test overlap!'
print\(f'Split OK — train:{len\(train\)} val:{len\(val\)} test:{len\(test\)} games'\)
" && python -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_parquet\('data/processed/cleaned.parquet'\)
required = {'gameId','playId','nflId','frameId','x','y','s','a_computed','dir_sin','dir_cos','o_sin','o_cos','is_interpolated','position','week'}
missing = required - set\(df.columns\)
assert not missing, f'Missing columns: {missing}'
print\(f'Schema OK — {len\(df\):,} rows, {len\(df.columns\)} cols'\)
assert df['a_computed'].isna\(\).sum\(\) / len\(df\) < 0.05, 'Too many null accelerations'
print\('Acceleration OK'\)
" && ls -lh outputs/validation/50_play_overlay.png 2>&1)
